_meta.description: Module definitions and bootstrap patterns for the splitter. Modules are discovered automatically by the LLM.

ui_panels.description: Main UI panels, toggle, settings menu, panel creation, DOM construction, innerHTML, createElement, appendChild, deep-tools-panel, plus-panel
